'''haguchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wyartite|wyartite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wyartite|wyartite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| haguchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hægichith|hægichith]] || [[word:hægichij|hægichij]] || [[word:hægichish|hægichish]] || [[word:hægichi|hægichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:haguguchuth|haguguchuth]] || [[word:haguguchuj|haguguchuj]] || [[word:haguguchush|haguguchush]] || [[word:haguguchu|haguguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:haguchuth|haguchuth]] || [[word:haguchuj|haguchuj]] || [[word:haguchush|haguchush]] || [[word:haguchu|haguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagufchuth|hagufchuth]] || [[word:hagufchuj|hagufchuj]] || [[word:hagufchush|hagufchush]] || [[word:hagufchuf|hagufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:haguchuthu|haguchuthu]] || [[word:haguchuju|haguchuju]] || [[word:haguchushu|haguchushu]] || [[word:haguchuku|haguchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:haguchuth|haguchuth]] || [[word:haguchuj|haguchuj]] || [[word:haguchush|haguchush]] || [[word:haguchu|haguchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:haguchuthul|haguchuthul]] || [[word:haguchujul|haguchujul]] || [[word:haguchushul|haguchushul]] || [[word:haguchukul|haguchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:haguchuthuthu|haguchuthuthu]] || [[word:haguchujuju|haguchujuju]] || [[word:haguchushushu|haguchushushu]] || [[word:haguchuku|haguchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:haguchuthun|haguchuthun]] || [[word:haguchujun|haguchujun]] || [[word:haguchushun|haguchushun]] || [[word:haguchukun|haguchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:haguchuthuoro|haguchuthuoro]] || [[word:haguchujuoro|haguchujuoro]] || [[word:haguchushuoro|haguchushuoro]] || [[word:haguchukuoro|haguchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
